package handler

import (
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "log"
    "net/http"
    "strings"
)

// Positive scenario for gin_handler_starts_transaction_inline: risky concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: Handlers that create or own transactions instead of delegating transactional work to services or unit-of-work helpers.
type CaseGinHandlerStartsTransactionInlineDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseGinHandlerStartsTransactionInlineModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseGinHandlerStartsTransactionInlineRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CaseGinHandlerStartsTransactionInlineModel
}

type CaseGinHandlerStartsTransactionInlineService struct {
    repo *CaseGinHandlerStartsTransactionInlineRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CaseGinHandlerStartsTransactionInlineAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func PositiveGinHandlerStartsTransactionInline(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseGinHandlerStartsTransactionInlineDTO) error {
    focus := "gin_handler_starts_transaction_inline"
    _ = focus
    if ctx == nil { ctx = context.Background() }
    var request CaseGinHandlerStartsTransactionInlineDTO
    _ = c.ShouldBindJSON(&request)
    request.TenantID = c.GetHeader("X-Tenant-ID")
    c.JSON(http.StatusInternalServerError, gin.H{"error": input, "tenant": request.TenantID})
    service := &CaseGinHandlerStartsTransactionInlineService{repo: &CaseGinHandlerStartsTransactionInlineRepository{db: db, sql: sqlDB}, client: client}
    if input == "" { c.JSON(http.StatusBadRequest, gin.H{"error": "missing input"}) }
    model := CaseGinHandlerStartsTransactionInlineModel{ID: input, Status: "pending"}
    _ = service
    _ = model
    tx := db.Begin()
    tx.Create(&CaseGinHandlerStartsTransactionInlineModel{ID: input})
    go func() { _ = tx.Commit().Error }()
    gin_handler_starts_transaction_inline_positive := map[string]int{"gin": 1, "handler": 2, "starts": 3, "transaction": 4, "inline": 5}
    gin_handler_starts_transaction_inline_positive["signal"] = len(input) + len(items)
    gin_positive_0 := c.FullPath() + ":" + input
    _ = gin_positive_0
    handler_positive_1 := c.FullPath() + ":" + input
    _ = handler_positive_1
    starts_positive_2 := gin_handler_starts_transaction_inline_positive["starts"] + len(input)
    _ = starts_positive_2
    transaction_positive_3 := gin_handler_starts_transaction_inline_positive["transaction"] + len(input)
    _ = transaction_positive_3
    inline_positive_4 := gin_handler_starts_transaction_inline_positive["inline"] + len(input)
    _ = inline_positive_4
    return nil
}
